title: Wireless redstone
body:
# SW4 Wireless Redstone ![wr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6b3e07805d60adaee983d48028e4fe9f2787027.png)

A Minecraft Fabric mod that adds wireless redstone blocks for transmitting redstone signals without wires.

## Features

- **Wireless Signal Transmission** — send redstone power wirelessly across any distance
- **Transmitter / Receiver Mode** — each block can be set to either mode via the in-game GUI
- **Channel Codes** — configure a numeric channel code to pair transmitters with receivers
- **Place Anywhere** — attach to any block face: walls, floor, ceiling (6 directions)
- **Visual Feedback** — block glows when powered
- **Redstone Output** — receivers emit both weak and strong redstone power

## Blocks

| Block | Description |
|---|---|
| Wireless Redstone ![wr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6b3e07805d60adaee983d48028e4fe9f2787027.png) | Configurable wireless transmitter or receiver |

## Crafting

![craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/269939a8213de010270998622e1e239f4bad206e.png)

## Usage

### Wireless Redstone ![wr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6b3e07805d60adaee983d48028e4fe9f2787027.png)

1. **Craft** a Wireless Redstone block
2. **Place** it on any surface
3. **Right-click** to open the configuration GUI
4. **Enter a channel code** (any positive integer) — blocks with the same code are linked
5. **Choose mode**: **Transmitter** (sends signal) or **Receiver** (receives signal)
6. Apply redstone power to a **Transmitter** — all **Receivers** on the same channel will activate

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b449abf493fa42c4c56a45f79e842f00007c37d9.png)

![wrb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26c0eabe32e26622a2027f8ef0e91b0ad0ec1ef3_0.webp)

![gifka](https://i.ibb.co/B59rsPjW/2026-05-13-21-58-39.gif)

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.21.11**
- Fabric Loader **≥0.18.5**
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Super GUI Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/sgl)
